subject: A robed figure atop a sandy rise channels magical energy toward a glowing coffin erupting with purple flames, while a large armored crocodilian creature watches nearby
description: An expansive desert scene at golden-hour sunset. In the background on a sandy ridge, a tall slender robed figure holds a staff topped with a glowing magical star or flower, channeling energy downward. In the foreground, an ornate sarcophagus or coffin bursts open with vivid purple-violet magical fire, its lid partially displaced. To the right crouches a large, armored bipedal crocodilian creature wearing decorative ornaments, watching the scene. Palm trees line the mid-ground and ancient stone towers/pylons rise on the right horizon. The sky is warm gold and amber with scattered clouds.
foreground: Glowing sarcophagus erupting with purple magical flames; large armored crocodilian creature crouching
background: Robed figure on sandy rise, palm trees, ancient stone pylons, warm sunset sky
emotion: reverent and awe-filled, the resurrection feels solemn rather than violent
